# Explicit Node Key Usage

## Summary
This issue template is designed to track and address the explicit usage of node keys in our application. Clear documentation and guidelines on how to use node keys are crucial for maintaining security and efficiency.

## Description
In order to enhance security and ensure proper implementation, it is important to make node key usage explicit. This includes:

- Detailed instructions on how to generate and manage node keys.
- Specifications on where and how to use node keys within the application.
- Guidelines for securely storing node keys.

## Action Items
- Review current documentation regarding node key usage.
- Identify any areas that require clarification or additional detail.
- Propose changes to make node keys usage more explicit.

## Additional Notes
Include any relevant information that may help address this issue.
